title: Licensed Third-Party Inspectors to Conduct Inspections Report

abstracts.abstract: Report of the Executive Office of Housing and Livable Communities (pursuant to Section 107 of Chapter 9 of the Acts of 2025) submitting its study on the feasibility and efficacy of allowing licensed third-party inspectors to conduct inspections of manufactured housing, off-site construction and multifamily housing projects

sponsorships.name: Executive Office of Housing and Livable Communities
